name: openviking-memory
description: Long-term semantic memory for Codex, powered by OpenViking, with built-in MCP wiring.

interface.shortDescription: Codex memory plugin with OpenViking MCP
interface.longDescription: Hooks Codex lifecycle events into OpenViking for recall and capture, and also exposes OpenViking's native MCP endpoint for direct model access.
defaultPrompt: Use OpenViking memory when previous context or long-term memory could help.
